ops.title: Sandboxed plan-trip.js runs need GETAWAY_HOME pinned in BOTH command templates (CLI and uvCmd), and the walker validates board docs only through the cc-present plugin binary
ops.body:
To run the v2.1 `plan-trip.js` graph walker against a scratch `GETAWAY_HOME` (demo/test trips), a scratch copy must prefix `GETAWAY_HOME=<dir>` in **two** places: `const CLI = ...` (judgment/status agent prompts) **and** `const uvCmd = (argv) => ...` (runner nodes execute compile-emitted commands through it). Patching only `CLI` sends every runner to the real `~/.getaway`, whose pre-v2 prefs make every command exit 3 (state conflict) — the run reports "node unstamped after one retry" on all runners while assess/status agents work fine. Scratch copies never get committed (see [[workflow-args-stringified-plan-trip]] for the older args shim, now fixed upstream).

Related: `cc-present push --dry-run <doc>` validates getaway pack blocks only via the cc-present **plugin** binary (`~/.claude/plugins/cache/cc-present/cc-present/<latest>/bin/cc-present`); the brew `cc-present` (0.4.0) predates packs and rejects `getaway.*` types. `docs/scripts/demo.sh` resolves the plugin binary for this reason.
